title: Life Path Number
about: Your core life path and central lesson: why you're here.

title: Birthday Number
about: Your innate talent: the gift you were handed for the road.

title: Expression Number
about: Your mission: what you're meant to build and become.

title: Soul Urge Number
about: What your soul secretly wants most: your hidden engine.

title: Personality Number
about: Your facade: how people read you before they know you.

title: Maturity Number
about: Who you grow into: the direction life converges on after ~40.

title: Pythagorean Square
about: A nine-cell map of your strongest and weakest traits.

title: Karmic Debt Numbers
about: Unfinished lessons carried in, if you have any.

title: Karmic Lessons & Hidden Passion
about: What you lack and must develop, plus your natural strength.

title: Sun Sign
about: Your core will and identity: how you shine into the world.

title: Chinese Zodiac Animal
about: Your base temperament: how you read on a gut level.

title: Year Element
about: The 'temperature' of your nature, layered over your animal.

title: Tarot Birth Card
about: The archetype of your fate, drawn from the major arcana.
